description: Tracy joined NRS in November 2023 as General Counsel, moving from NDA where she was Head of Legal and Deputy General Counsel. Tracy studied in Scotland and is dual qualified as a lawyer in both Scotland and England / Wales.  She originally trained as an environment and safety lawyer working in private practice law firms In Glasgow and Manchester, and then joined the NDA group as an inhouse lawyer initially at Sellafield in 2009 and the NDA in 2019. Tracy has a broad regulatory and commercial legal background and a deep level of experience of working in an operating nuclear company.  Tracy heads up the General Counsel Function at NRS which comprises the Legal Team, the Ethics and Compliance Team, and the Corporate Governance Team. The General Counsel is responsible for advising on and ensuring the appropriate management of legal risk arising from business activities and operations on behalf of the Executive and the Board.

details.body:
Tracy joined NRS in November 2023 as General Counsel, moving from NDA where she was Head of Legal and Deputy General Counsel.

Tracy studied in Scotland and is dual qualified as a lawyer in both Scotland and England / Wales.  She originally trained as an environment and safety lawyer working in private practice law firms In Glasgow and Manchester, and then joined the NDA group as an inhouse lawyer initially at Sellafield in 2009 and the NDA in 2019. Tracy has a broad regulatory and commercial legal background and a deep level of experience of working in an operating nuclear company. 

Tracy heads up the General Counsel Function at NRS which comprises the Legal Team, the Ethics and Compliance Team, and the Corporate Governance Team. The General Counsel is responsible for advising on and ensuring the appropriate management of legal risk arising from business activities and operations on behalf of the Executive and the Board.

title: Tracy Murray
